name: ephemeris-calendar
invariants: output.ok !== true || output.result.calendar.every(d => typeof d.date === 'string' && d.moonIllumination >= 0 && d.moonIllumination <= 1)
_note: astronomy.ephemeris-calendar is a pure rise/set-sampling LENS_ACTIONS handler. It produces one calendar row per day (moon phase + illumination + Sun/Moon rise/set ISO timestamps) for a clamped span (days ∈ [1,60]). parseObserver clamps lat/lon into the physical envelope, so the poisoned case (lat 91, days 99999) still returns a valid 60-day calendar with an in-range observer. A malformed startDate or a missing observer is rejected. try/catch-wrapped — never throws. LENS_ACTIONS-only; AstronomySkySection / SkyChartWorkbench reach it via /api/lens/run.
